name: @signicode/verser2-host
description: TLS HTTP/2 Host for routing Broker requests to outbound Verser2 Guests.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --target es2019 --platform node --sourcemap --clean --external @signicode/verser-common && dts-bundle-generator --project tsconfig.json --out-file dist/index.d.ts src/index.ts && node ../../scripts/copy-package-license.js .
